user_prompt: Review this sales data for issues and create a leadership report

facts_produced_in_excel_step2: anomalies_detected: [North/Product_B Nov z=2.26, North/Product_C Dec z=2.26, South/Product_B Mar z=-3.06, South/Product_E Aug z=-2.81]

word_output_actual_text.executive_summary: Full-year revenue 8,315,392 across 33,120 units. H2 up 7.7% vs H1. Best month: November (749,317). Worst month: March (624,272). 4 anomalies detected requiring investigation.
word_output_actual_text.anomaly_section: 4 statistical outliers detected at |z|>=2 threshold. Anomaly details: North/Product_B in November: revenue 51,790 (z-score 2.26); North/Product_C in December: revenue 45,366 (z-score 2.26); South/Product_B in March: revenue 7,531 (z-score -3.06); South/Product_E in August: revenue 20,000 (z-score -2.81).
recommendations: Investigate North/Product_B November anomaly — revenue dropped to 51,790 (z=2.26).
